_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Java
author: admin@sleepyneko.com
description: A Generic Java Egg for Pterodactyl. Supports running a pre-built JAR directly or cloning a Git repo and building it with Maven or Gradle before launch.
startup: if [[ -d .git ]] && [[ "{{AUTO_UPDATE}}" == "1" ]]; then git pull; fi; if [[ "{{BUILD_TOOL}}" == "maven" ]]; then if [ -x ./mvnw ]; then ./mvnw -B -DskipTests package; else mvn -B -DskipTests package; fi; elif [[ "{{BUILD_TOOL}}" == "gradle" ]]; then if [ -x ./gradlew ]; then ./gradlew build -x test; else gradle build -x test; fi; fi; java {{JAVA_ARGS}} -jar {{JAR_FILE}} {{APP_ARGS}}

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Java generic package

apt update
apt install -y git curl jq maven gradle unzip

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

if [ "${USER_UPLOAD}" == "true" ] || [ "${USER_UPLOAD}" == "1" ]; then
    echo -e "assuming user knows what they are doing have a good day."
    exit 0
fi

if [ -z "${GIT_ADDRESS}" ]; then
    echo -e "no git repo address given, assuming a jar will be uploaded manually"
    exit 0
fi

## add git ending if it's not on the address
if [[ ${GIT_ADDRESS} != *.git ]]; then
    GIT_ADDRESS=${GIT_ADDRESS}.git
fi

if [ -z "${USERNAME}" ] && [ -z "${ACCESS_TOKEN}" ]; then
    echo -e "using anon api call"
else
    GIT_ADDRESS="https://${USERNAME}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@$(echo -e ${GIT_ADDRESS} | cut -d/ -f3-)"
fi

## pull git java repo
if [ "$(ls -A /mnt/server)" ]; then
    echo -e "/mnt/server directory is not empty."
    if [ -d .git ]; then
        echo -e ".git directory exists"
        if [ -f .git/config ]; then
            echo -e "loading info from git config"
            ORIGIN=$(git config --get remote.origin.url)
        else
            echo -e "files found with no git config"
            echo -e "closing out without touching things to not break anything"
            exit 10
        fi
    fi

    if [ "${ORIGIN}" == "${GIT_ADDRESS}" ]; then
        echo "pulling latest from github"
        git pull
    fi
else
    echo -e "/mnt/server is empty.\ncloning files into repo"
    if [ -z ${BRANCH} ]; then
        echo -e "cloning default branch"
        git clone ${GIT_ADDRESS} .
    else
        echo -e "cloning ${BRANCH}'"
        git clone --single-branch --branch ${BRANCH} ${GIT_ADDRESS} .
    fi

fi

if [ "${BUILD_TOOL}" == "maven" ] && [ -f pom.xml ]; then
    echo -e "building with maven"
    if [ -x ./mvnw ]; then chmod +x ./mvnw && ./mvnw -B -DskipTests package; else mvn -B -DskipTests package; fi
elif [ "${BUILD_TOOL}" == "gradle" ] && ([ -f build.gradle ] || [ -f build.gradle.kts ]); then
    echo -e "building with gradle"
    if [ -x ./gradlew ]; then chmod +x ./gradlew && ./gradlew build -x test; else gradle build -x test; fi
fi

export HOME=/mnt/server

echo -e "install complete"
exit 0

variables.name: JAR File
variables.description:
The JAR file to execute.

If using Maven/Gradle, this should be the path to the built jar (e.g. target/app.jar or build/libs/app.jar).

variables.name: Build Tool
variables.description:
Whether to build the project before launch, and with which tool.

none = run the JAR as-is (default, for uploaded jars)
maven = run mvn (or ./mvnw) package before launch
gradle = run gradle (or ./gradlew) build before launch

variables.name: Java Arguments
variables.description: Extra arguments passed to the java binary before -jar, e.g. -Xms128M -Xmx1024M

variables.name: Application Arguments
variables.description: Extra arguments passed to the application after the jar file.

variables.name: Git Repo Address
variables.description:
Git repo to clone. Leave blank if you plan to upload a pre-built JAR instead.

I.E. https://github.com/parkervcp/repo_name

variables.name: Git Branch
variables.description:
What branch to pull from github.

Default is blank to pull the repo default branch

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Pull the latest files on startup when using a GitHub repo.

variables.name: User Uploaded Files
variables.description:
Skip all the install/git stuff if you are letting a user upload files (e.g. a pre-built jar).

0 = false (default)
1 = true

variables.name: Git Access Token
variables.description:
Password to use with git.

It's best practice to use a Personal Access Token.
https://github.com/settings/tokens
https://gitlab.com/-/profile/personal_access_tokens
